mapper.insert: INSERT INTO price_policies ( accommodation_id, room_type_id, policy_name, start_date, end_date, delta_amount, day_of_week_mask, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{accommodationId}, #{roomTypeId}, #{policyName}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{deltaAmount}, #{dayOfWeekMask}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
